title: Pan-Seared Salmon with Caramelized Hash
description: A simple and flavorful dish that combines the richness of caramelized hash with the delicate flavor of pan-seared salmon.
instructions: Season the salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the salmon fillets for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the salmon to a plate and set aside.
Heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil in the skillet over medium heat.
Add the caramelized hash browns and stir to combine.
Add the sherry to the skillet and stir to deglaze, scraping up any browned bits.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the hash is heated through.
Serve the pan-seared salmon with the caramelized hash.
